title: Validate starter templates and oversight adoption
summary: Proves the starter templates and real oversight alignment through validation and closeout evidence.
scope_items: Run validation, reconciliation, and evidence passes for the starter templates and the aligned oversight pack.
Use the real WatchTowerOversight repo as the second-pack adoption proof instead of synthetic fixtures only.
done_when_items: Validation evidence covers both the starter scaffolds and the real second-repo adoption path.
